Tataru Zu Hestui:
Tejakar Oroka! Greetings, young traveler. I am Tataru of the Hestui tribe, one of the samans tasked with passing on the teachings of flame from the god Pa'agrio!
The Orcish magic uses the authority of the sacred flame to force spirits to do our bidding - unlike those weak-willed Elves who worship spirits as if they were gods, or those dim-witted Humans who regard magic as science!
